**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Tonghui Optoelectronic Technology Co., Ltd. is a typical shell company/small contractor specimen that packages its qualifications by confusing 'R&D,' 'materials,' with 'labor/retail.' The underlying severely fake high-tech Apple Inc. consumer electronics supply chain data has been forcibly destroyed. Because its name contains 'Optoelectronic Technology,' the official commercial system erroneously grabbed the macro classification of 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the forensic engine instantly tore through this disguise: although its paid-in capital is nominally reported as 5 million, the 2024 insured headcount is an extremely glaring '0 people'! Its registered address is located at 'Room 202,' International Cooperation Innovation Park, No. 16 Zidan Road, Qinhuai District. In an office of an industrial park, employing 0 workers to conduct 'optoelectronic device sales' and 'electromechanical coupling system R&D'? Even more laughable is the true base color of its business license: the first permitted item is 'construction labor subcontracting'; the subsequent general items surprisingly include 'home appliance installation services,' 'furniture installation and repair services,' 'knitwear and textile sales,' and 'daily general merchandise sales.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an optoelectronic manufacturing enterprise, but a pure 'Zero-Employee Labor Subcontracting & Trading SPV' (shell company and grocery reselling). The so-called optoelectronic technology is merely a facade used to elevate its status when taking on plumbing and electrical installation projects, pitching lighting fixtures, or selling daily necessities.
